name: SEAFARER EXPLORATION CORP
summary: Seafarer Exploration Corp. is a Florida-based company focused on rescue archaeology, exploration, recovery, and conservation of historic shipwrecks. The company conducts archival research, translates historical documents, and develops proprietary technology including the SeaSearcher, a metal discriminator that differentiates between metals including gold and silver. It has not generated meaningful revenue since inception and relies on external financing to fund operations.

products.name: SeaSearcher
products.description: Proprietary metal discriminator device that differentiates between ferrous and nonferrous metals including gold and silver for use in historic shipwreck exploration.

products.name: Handheld Metal Discriminator
products.description: Handheld precision location device for ferrous and nonferrous metals developed based on SeaSearcher technology.

partnerships.description: Collaborated with an unnamed development partner to build the SeaSearcher and handheld metal discriminator technologies.
